basic_details.job_title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Walkin for Pharmacist & Paramedical Hospital Technician
basic_details.post_name: Contractual Pharmacist & Contractual Paramedical Hospital Technician
basic_details.short_information: OIL is engaging 07 personnel purely on contractual basis for immediate requirement at Duliajan.

age_limit.age_details: Contractual (Initial 1 year, extendable up to 2 years)

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of registration for Walk-in. | Contractual Pharmacist (05 posts): | 10+2 in Science stream 02 years Diploma in Pharmacy + valid registration with Assam Pharmacy Council Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience as Pharmacist | Contractual Paramedical Hospital Technician (02 posts): | 10+2 in Science + Diploma in OT Technology / Emergency & First Aid / ICU Technology (02 years) Minimum 02 years post-qualification relevant experience

selection_process: Selection will be based on Walk-in for Personal Assessment (Total 100 marks). Qualifying marks: 50 for all categories.
how_to_apply: Candidates must report for registration between 07:00 AM to 09:00 AM on 07/08/2026 at the venue with all original documents and self-attested copies.
Venue: Duliajan Club, Oil India Limited, Duliajan, Assam
important_instructions: This is purely contractual engagement. No claim for regular appointment. Candidates must be domiciled in Assam or Arunachal Pradesh. Bring all original documents for verification. Mobile phones and electronic devices are strictly prohibited.

content_sections.heading: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of registration for Walk-in. Contractual Pharmacist (05 posts): 10+2 in Science stream 02 years Diploma in Pharmacy + valid registration with Assam Pharmacy Council Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience as Pharmacist Contractual Paramedical Hospital Technician (02 posts): 10+2 in Science + Diploma in OT Technology / Emergency & First Aid / ICU Technology (02 years) Minimum 02 years post-qualification relevant experience

content_sections.heading: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit (as on date of registration)
Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Walk-in for Personal Assessment (Total 100 marks). Qualifying marks: 50 for all categories.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for OIL Duliajan Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must report for registration between 07:00 AM to 09:00 AM on 07/08/2026 at the venue with all original documents and self-attested copies. Venue: Duliajan Club, Oil India Limited, Duliajan, Assam

content_sections.heading: Oil India Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is purely contractual engagement. No claim for regular appointment. Candidates must be domiciled in Assam or Arunachal Pradesh. Bring all original documents for verification. Mobile phones and electronic devices are strictly prohibited.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for OIL Duliajan Contractual Pharmacist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Walk-in Registration & Personal Assessment is on 07th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in OIL Contractual Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 07 posts – 05 Pharmacist and 02 Paramedical Hospital Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Contractual Pharmacist in OIL Duliajan?
faq.answer: Fixed ₹24,960/- per month + Variable ₹960/- per working day.

faq.question: Q4. Who can apply for OIL Paramedical Hospital Technician posts?
faq.answer: Candidates with 10+2 Science + relevant 2-year Diploma (OT/Emergency/ICU) and 2 years experience, domiciled in Assam/Arunachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any written exam for OIL Contractual Recruitment?
faq.answer: No. Selection is through Walk-in Personal Assessment (100 marks).

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for OIL Duliajan Walk-in?
faq.answer: All educational certificates, experience proof, caste certificate, photo ID, Aadhaar, PAN, etc. in original + self-attested copies.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from other states apply for OIL Duliajan contractual posts?
faq.answer: No. Only candidates domiciled in Assam and Arunachal Pradesh are eligible.
